expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: The top category navigation is wider than the viewport and the rightmost tab is visibly cut off, showing only part of the “Hot Games” label.
Game tiles in the content sections are clipped on the right side, with partial cards visible and text/images cut off.
The fixed bottom navigation appears to overlap the game list content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering lower game cards.
The carousel arrow controls on the hero banner sit very close to the screen edges and overlap the banner artwork, making them feel cramped.
Some small informational “i” icons on game cards have low visibility against dark image areas and may be hard to tap accurately.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a missing responsible gaming icon from the top nav bar; reported issues focus on layout clipping and overflow problems rather than missing UI elements.
